texto: It's kind of a funny way to put it, but if you want to study a dynamic economic system, what you'd like to be able to do is focus on the linkages, say, between asset markets and the macro economy without having to model everything at the same time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lars Peter Hansen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “It's kind of a funny way to put it, but if you want to study a dynamic economic system, what you'…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, time, focus pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de estudos e focus.

frase_original: It's kind of a funny way to put it, but if you want to study a dynamic economic system, what you'd like to be able to do is focus on the linkages, say, between asset markets and the macro economy without having to model everything at the same time.
